TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Spain, title = Spain, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spain} }

S.FORM: Spain hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 00 N, 4 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 505,370 sq km (maki' tay 52ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 498,980 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 6,390 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 48,563,476. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 54.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 36.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 9.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Madrid. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Felipe VI, aring ryax 19 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Spain hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 00 N, 4 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 505,370 sq km (maki' tay 52ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 498,980 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 6,390 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 48,563,476. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 54.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 36.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 9.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Madrid. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 12 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Felipe VI, aring ryax 19 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēpain ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ma*ri*. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *elipe *i, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
